summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Renergizr Industries B2B energy trading platform website. All major functionality working correctly with one mobile responsiveness issue identified.

ui_bugs.issue: Mobile menu toggle button not properly clickable on mobile viewport (390x844). Button is present but has positioning/responsive design issue.

passed_tests: Home page loads with all required sections (hero, features, about preview, CTA)
Navigation works - all nav links (Home, About, Services, Contact) are clickable and redirect properly
About page loads with company story, values, timeline, leadership sections
Services page loads with main services, modules, technology, and process sections
Contact page loads with contact form and FAQ section
Footer is present on all pages with company info and links
Contact form accepts input and shows success message (static functionality)
All CTA buttons redirect correctly between pages
Professional energy-themed design with greens/teals colors
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix mobile navigation toggle button responsiveness issue. The button exists but has CSS positioning problems preventing it from being clickable on mobile viewports.
